channel.title: Kai Tobias Block
channel.description: Recent content on Kai Tobias Block

item.description: 2024 Creating an Open-Source Low-Field MRI Scanner in Just One Week How To Be An Academic Radiologist (HTBAR) Course 2024 Penn Medicine, Department of Radiology 4/9/24, Philadelphia, USA 2023 Experience from the MRI4ALL Hackathon 2023 MRI Together 2023 - A Global Workshop on Open and Reproducible Science 12/6/23, ESMRMB Virtual Conference Watch online 2021 Decentralized Reconstruction in Academia MRI Together - A Global Workshop on Open Science and Reproducible MR Research

Data Platforms & Architecture Recorded during the plenary session “Challenging the Assumptions of MRI” at ISMRM 2018 in Paris. Experience from the MRI4ALL Hackathon 2023 Recorded at “MRI Together 2023 - A global workshop on Open and Reproducible Science”. Distributed Reconstruction in Academia Recorded at “MRI Together 2021 - A global workshop on Open Science and Reproducible MR Research”. Creating New Value Through Innovation Recorded at the 2018 RSNA & ISMRM Joint Workshop on High-Value MRI in Washington DC.
